title: Digital Marketing Trainer
description: We are looking for an experienced digital marketing trainer to join Pixl Pluz Academy. You will design and deliver course content, mentor students, evaluate projects, and contribute to curriculum development.
requirements: 3+ years of industry experience in digital marketing
Experience with SEO, Google Ads, and social media marketing
responsibilities: Deliver engaging classroom and online sessions
Conduct portfolio reviews and mock interviews
Stay updated on digital marketing trends

title: Web Development Instructor
description: Join Pixl Pluz Academy as a Web Development Instructor and help students build job-ready skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. You will guide students through real projects and portfolio development.
requirements: 2+ years of professional web development experience
Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React
Experience with modern development tools and AI coding assistants
responsibilities: Teach web development concepts from fundamentals to advanced
Review and provide feedback on student projects
Conduct code reviews and pair programming sessions
Support students in building their portfolios

title: Student Counsellor & Admissions Officer
description: We are looking for a motivated Student Counsellor to guide prospective students through the admissions process, scholarship applications, and course selection at Pixl Pluz Academy.
requirements: 1+ year of experience in education counselling or sales
Understanding of digital careers and course offerings
Ability to handle multiple enquiries and follow-ups
responsibilities: Handle student enquiries via phone, email, and walk-ins
Guide students through scholarship and admission process
Maintain enquiry records and follow-up database
Coordinate with faculty for counselling sessions
